Cadet College Pishin

Shaping Future Leaders Since 2011

Learn MoreApply Now

About CCPN

Cadet College Pishin is a premier residential institution established in 2011 to provide quality education and character building to the youth of Balochistan.

Excellence in Education Since 2011

Cadet College Pishin (CCPN) was established with the vision of providing world-class education to the talented youth of Balochistan. The college follows the national curriculum while incorporating modern teaching methodologies and character-building programs.

Our cadets receive comprehensive training in academics, physical fitness, leadership, and co-curricular activities. The college has produced outstanding results in board examinations and has earned recognition at national level competitions.

Explore Our History

Mission

To provide quality education and character building to produce future leaders for Pakistan.

Vision

To be the premier educational institution in Balochistan, recognized for excellence.

Values

Integrity, discipline, excellence, and service to the nation.

500+
Cadets Enrolled
50+
Expert Faculty
100%
Success Rate

Our History

A journey of excellence and dedication since our establishment in 2011.

Establishment

Cadet College Pishin was established in 2011 to provide quality education to the youth of Balochistan.

2011

Establishment

Cadet College Pishin was established in 2011 to provide quality education to the youth of Balochistan.

2011

First Batch

The first batch of cadets was inducted, marking the beginning of a new era in education.

2012

First Batch

The first batch of cadets was inducted, marking the beginning of a new era in education.

2012

First Passing Out

The first batch of cadets passed out, setting a high standard for future generations.

2014

First Passing Out

The first batch of cadets passed out, setting a high standard for future generations.

2014

Expansion

The college expanded its facilities, adding new academic blocks and hostels.

2016

Expansion

The college expanded its facilities, adding new academic blocks and hostels.

2016

Sports Complex

A state-of-the-art sports complex was inaugurated to promote physical fitness.

2018

Sports Complex

A state-of-the-art sports complex was inaugurated to promote physical fitness.

2018

Digital Learning

Introduction of digital learning platforms and smart classrooms.

2020

Introduction of digital learning platforms and smart classrooms.

2020

Celebrated 10 years of excellence with a grand ceremony and alumni reunion.

2023

2023

Academics

Comprehensive curriculum designed to develop intellectual capabilities and practical skills.

Science

Physics, Chemistry, Biology with modern labs

Mathematics

Advanced mathematics and computational thinking

Computer Science

Programming, AI, and digital literacy

English

Literature, grammar, and communication skills

Urdu

Urdu literature, poetry, and composition

Islamiat

Islamic studies and moral education

Pakistan Studies

History, geography, and civics

Physical Training

Drill, sports, and physical fitness

Academic Structure

6th - 8th

Middle School

Foundation building with core subjects and character development.

9th - 10th

Matriculation

Preparation for SSC examinations with science and arts groups.

11th - 12th

Intermediate

FSc Pre-Medical, Pre-Engineering, and ICS programs.

Admissions

Join the ranks of future leaders. Admission opens once a year for 8th class.

Eligibility Criteria

  • Age between 12-14 years for 8th class admission
  • Passed 7th class examination from a recognized school
  • Pakistani nationality with valid CNIC/B-form
  • Domicile of Balochistan province
  • Medically fit as per college standards
  • Good moral character and discipline record

Important Dates

Application Opens: January 15, 2025

Last Date: February 28, 2025

Entry Test: March 15, 2025

Classes Begin: April 1, 2025

Admission Process

Step 1

Application

Fill out the online or offline application form with required documents.

Step 2

Entry Test

Appear in the written entry test covering English, Math, and General Science.

Step 3

Interview

Shortlisted candidates are called for a personal interview.

Step 4

Medical

Medical examination at the college dispensary.

Step 5

Enrollment

Final selection and enrollment process.

Facilities

World-class infrastructure to support holistic development of our cadets.

Academic Block

Spacious classrooms with modern teaching aids

Science Laboratories

Well-equipped physics, chemistry, and biology labs

Computer Lab

High-speed internet and latest software

Library

Thousands of books, journals, and digital resources

Hostels

Comfortable boarding with 24/7 security

Mess Hall

Nutritious meals prepared under strict hygiene

Medical Dispensary

Qualified medical staff and ambulance service

Sports Complex

Indoor and outdoor sports facilities

Sports & Co-Curricular

Developing physical fitness, teamwork, and competitive spirit through diverse sports programs.

Football

Professional coaching and regular tournaments

Cricket

Net practice and inter-college matches

Hockey

Field hockey with expert trainers

Athletics

Track and field events training

Basketball

Indoor and outdoor courts

Swimming

Olympic-size swimming pool

Tennis

Professional tennis courts

Gymnastics

Indoor gymnasium with equipment

Achievements

Recognitions and milestones that reflect our commitment to excellence.

2023

Best Cadet College Award

Recognized as the best cadet college in Balochistan province.

2022

100% Matric Results

All cadets secured A+ grades in matriculation examinations.

2023

Inter-College Sports Champions

Won the overall championship in inter-cadet college sports.

2022

Debate Competition Winners

First place in national level debate competition.

2021

Science Fair Gold Medal

Gold medal at the National Science Fair.

2023

Best Discipline Award

Awarded for maintaining the highest standards of discipline.
